message:
refactor(codegen): Add auto-closing helpers to _locale_mod.zig and struct_mod.zig

Add emitConst and emitFmtConst helper functions for consistent builder
pattern. Significantly reduces boilerplate in all gen* functions.

_locale_mod.zig: Refactored 28 gen* functions
struct_mod.zig: Refactored 6 gen* functions (genPack, genUnpack,
genCalcsize, genPackInto, genUnpackFrom, genIterUnpack)

Part of Phase 2 ZigBuilder migration.
